title: Eliminate api.manus.im DNS calls — Magic-link auth migration
problem: SocketException: Failed host lookup 'api.manus.im' — Cloud Run has no VPC egress to Manus OAuth backend. Every tRPC request triggered a DNS lookup because sdk.ts called getUserInfoWithJwt() on every request with a valid JWT session cookie.
root_cause: sdk.ts authenticateRequest() called getUserInfoWithJwt() which made HTTP POST to api.manus.im on every request. oauth.ts registered /api/oauth/callback which also called api.manus.im. Neither endpoint is reachable from Cloud Run.

solution.sdk_ts: Rewrote to remove all api.manus.im calls. authenticateRequest() now only verifies JWT locally and looks up user in local DB. No network calls to external OAuth servers.
solution.oauth_ts: Rewrote to remove the Manus OAuth callback route entirely. Kept only the logout route and session cookie helpers.
solution.magic_link_backend: Created server/magicLink.ts with POST /api/auth/magic-link/request (rate-limited, sends link via notifyOwner) and GET /api/auth/magic-link/verify (validates SHA-256 token hash, upserts user, sets JWT session cookie). Registered in server/_core/index.ts.
solution.db_helpers: Added createMagicLinkToken, findValidMagicLinkToken, markMagicLinkUsed, countRecentMagicLinks to server/db.ts.
solution.schema: magic_link_tokens table already existed from Phase 100 — migration was already applied.
solution.frontend: Created MagicLinkDialog.tsx component. Rewrote const.ts to export openSignInDialog() (dispatches td:open-sign-in event). Migrated main.tsx, useAuth.ts, DashboardLayout.tsx, Home.tsx from getLoginUrl() to openSignInDialog(). Mounted MagicLinkDialog in App.tsx.

known_limitation: Magic links are sent via notifyOwner (Manus owner notification) not directly to user email. Need transactional email provider (SendGrid/Resend) for production. Wire in server/magicLink.ts sendMagicLinkEmail() function.
pending_next: Wire transactional email provider for magic-link delivery
Make Registry filters URL-persistent (verdict/vertical/page in query params)
Add copy citation link button on /claims/:id
Add recently verified section to homepage
